facts.statement: Apollo 11 was the spaceflight that first landed humans on the Moon.
questions: What was the first spaceflight to land humans on the Moon?
Which mission first landed humans on the Moon?
What was Apollo 11?

facts.statement: Apollo 11 landed on the Moon on July 20, 1969.
questions: When did Apollo 11 land on the Moon?
What happened on July 20, 1969?
On what date did humans first land on the Moon?

facts.statement: Apollo 11 was crewed by Neil Armstrong, Buzz Aldrin, and Michael Collins.
questions: Who were the crew members of Apollo 11?
Who flew on the Apollo 11 mission?
What astronauts were on Apollo 11?

facts.statement: Neil Armstrong became the first person to walk on the Moon.
questions: Who was the first person to walk on the Moon?
What did Neil Armstrong accomplish on Apollo 11?
Which astronaut first stepped on the lunar surface?

facts.statement: Buzz Aldrin walked on the Moon after Neil Armstrong.
questions: Who was the second person to walk on the Moon?
Which astronaut walked on the Moon after Neil Armstrong?
Did Buzz Aldrin walk on the Moon?

facts.statement: Michael Collins remained in orbit aboard the command module during the Apollo 11 mission.
questions: What did Michael Collins do during Apollo 11?
Did Michael Collins land on the Moon?
Who stayed in orbit during the Apollo 11 lunar landing?

facts.statement: The Apollo 11 lunar module was named Eagle.
questions: What was the name of the Apollo 11 lunar module?
What was Eagle?
What was the lunar module called on Apollo 11?

facts.statement: The Apollo 11 astronauts collected about 21.5 kilograms of lunar material to return to Earth.
questions: How much lunar material did Apollo 11 collect?
What did the Apollo 11 astronauts bring back from the Moon?
How many kilograms of Moon rocks did Apollo 11 return?
